title: Connection Lost on fresh install in Hostinger
symptom: After setting up n8n on Hostinger, the interface shows 'Connection Lost' when trying to upload a template.
not_this_if: n8n is already running without issues
root_cause: The issue arises because the n8n Docker image version is not specified, leading to potential compatibility issues or bugs in the latest version. Specifying a stable version can resolve these connection problems.
fix_steps: Run the command: docker pull docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0
Modify the docker-compose.yml file to specify the image version as 'docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0'
Save the changes to the docker-compose.yml file
Run the command: docker compose up -d
agent_instruction: Pull the specific n8n version and update your docker-compose configuration.
